overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit futuristic city district at night. The character walks through wet streets, crosses a road, visits an elevated shrine area with a giant holographic statue, and explores a covered market with traditional Japanese architecture mixed with high-tech cyberpunk elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character steps onto yellow striped crosswalk and begins crossing the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking through the crosswalk in a neon-lit cyberpunk district with pedestrians alongside

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white pants walking alongside the character toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive holographic projection of a robed female figure floating above the city buildings
tall building with bright purple neon trim and glowing windows
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes on wet reflective asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet neon-lit street at night, approaching and entering a yellow-striped crosswalk. The massive holographic statue of a robed figure dominates the skyline ahead, while pedestrians walk alongside. Purple neon lights illuminate the buildings to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with bus stop and moving traffic

events.description: character turns right and walks along the street parallel to traffic flow
approaching stairs leading up to the elevated shrine platform

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past a traditional-style bus shelter with red lanterns

notable_agents.action: cars passing by creating white and red light streaks from long exposure on wet pavement

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style shelter with red paper lanterns and curved wooden roof
long exposure light trails from vehicle headlights and taillights on the wet road

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and walks along the street edge, passing a traditional bus shelter adorned with red lanterns. Traffic passes by on the right creating streaks of light on the wet asphalt. The holographic statue remains visible in the distance to the left as the character approaches stairs leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated shrine platform with traditional Japanese architecture

events.description: ascends stairs to elevated shrine area with traditional architecture and cherry blossoms
camera tilts upward to view the giant holographic statue from below against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking around the elevated shrine platform observing the holographic statue and traditional structures

entered.detail: pagoda-style wooden roofs with curved eaves and red structural trim
illuminated trees with pink glowing blossoms lining the platform edge
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated platform

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an elevated shrine platform featuring traditional Japanese architecture with pagoda-style roofs and illuminated cherry blossom trees. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive holographic statue towering overhead. The character walks along the platform, passing wooden structures and metal railings while observing the cyberpunk cityscape beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to market area

events.description: descends concrete stairs from elevated platform back to lower street level
enters covered market area with food stalls and pink neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a lower plaza area with neon lighting and market stalls

notable_agents.action: character in dark clothing walking ahead down the stairs

entered.detail: illuminated street food cart with umbrella and glowing menu items
wall intensely illuminated with pink neon lights creating atmospheric glow
wide concrete staircase descending from the elevated platform

segments.scene_description: The character descends concrete stairs from the elevated shrine, leaving the traditional architecture behind. The scene transitions into a covered market area bathed in pink neon light. An illuminated food cart appears on the right as the character walks toward the market entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with hanging red lanterns

events.description: walking through dense canopy of hanging red paper lanterns illuminating the path
camera pans to overlook lower market area from elevated walkway with metal beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market passing food stalls and observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt leaning over railing looking down at the market below

entered.detail: numerous red paper lanterns hanging in dense strings overhead creating a canopy
rows of vendor stalls with illuminated signs and merchandise displays
green painted steel beams supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The character explores a covered market street dense with hanging red paper lanterns creating a glowing canopy overhead. Rows of market stalls line the right side with illuminated signs. The character passes a person leaning over the railing and walks through green metal support beams while neon advertisements glow in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked neon street up into a traditional elevated shrine and finally down into a glowing covered market. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped street under the gaze of a massive holographic statue, passing purple-lit buildings and pedestrians. As the character turns right past a red-lanterned bus shelter and streaks of traffic, the path leads upward via a set of stairs. The scene then opens onto an elevated shrine platform where traditional pagoda roofs and illuminated cherry blossom trees contrast with the towering holographic figure and the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. Finally, the camera descends concrete stairs to leave the shrine behind, transitioning into a dense market street bathed in pink neon and a canopy of hanging red paper lanterns.
